attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   AS AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(NCPCT.DD_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,-999) AS REBOK_RPRT_PGTMV_BE_GEO_ID_INT,
COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REBOK_PGTMV_PTNR_CNTRY_PTY_KEY,
NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY AS  REBOK_PGTMV_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_CREATE_USER ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
'I'	ACTION_CODE ,
'I'	DML_TYPE,
SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL AS PARTNER_CERTIFICATION_CD

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_NAPLD_REV SOTNR
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =SOTNR.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT
ON SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
ON NCPCT.PGTMV_PARTNER_COUNTRY_ID_INT  =  SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
AND NCPCT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE SOTNR.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'

SELECT
EOTNR.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,EOTNR.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
,EOTNR.GLOBAL_NAME
,EOTNR.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,EOTNR.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,EOTNR.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,EOTNR.SAV_ID
,EOTNR.SPLIT_PERCENT
,EOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,EOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,EOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,EOTNR.START_DATE
,EOTNR.STATUS_CODE
,EOTNR.CREATION_DATE
,EOTNR.USER_NAME
,EOTNR.VALIDATION_DATE
,EOTNR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,EOTNR.BATCH_ID
,EOTNR.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_NAPLD_REV EOTNR
WHERE EOTNR.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EOTNR.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER' AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_NAPLD_REV SOTNR
WHERE SOTNR.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID=EOTNR.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SOTNR.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER')

SELECT
SOTNR.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,SOTNR.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
,SOTNR.GLOBAL_NAME
,SOTNR.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,SOTNR.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,SOTNR.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,SOTNR.SAV_ID
,SOTNR.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,SOTNR.START_DATE
,SOTNR.STATUS_CODE
,SOTNR.CREATION_DATE
,SOTNR.USER_NAME
,SOTNR.VALIDATION_DATE
,SOTNR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOTNR.BATCH_ID
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
,SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTNER_CERT_LEVEL

 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE_SS_CODE 
 , PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE AS PARTNER_ASSIGNMENT_CODE 
 , PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE AS PARTNER_OVERRIDE_REASON_CODE FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_NAPLD_REV SOTNR
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT =SOTNR.CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
AND SOTNR.GLOBAL_NAME=NATL.SS_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER  NCPT
ON SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID = NCPT.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
ON NCPCT.PGTMV_PARTNER_COUNTRY_ID_INT  =  SOTNR.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
AND NCPCT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
WHERE SOTNR.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'PARTNER'
AND (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NULL
OR NCPT.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL)
